1 284 players online

Play the classic property game online

Real-time multiplayer tables with private rooms and built-in negotiation. Create a session, share a code, and trade your way to the top.

Create a game
T

Real-time tables

Live game state synced across every seat. Moves, rolls, and trades update instantly for all players.

Private rooms

Create a session and share an invite code. Only players with the code can join your table.

Built-in negotiation

Propose trades in-session without leaving the board. Offers and counter-offers stay in the game flow.

TYCOON

Heritage Finance design system — multiplayer property trading
